sets.name: Agent Set

bonuses.description: Get Bullet Saver effect with every precise kill, Weakspot DMG +15% for 8s. Effect can stack up to 3 times.
After killing an enemy, gain Reload Efficiency +20%. If it is a Weakspot kill, also gain Fire Rate +10%. Lasts until you reload.

sets.description: 1-Piece: Head DMG Reduction +10% | 2-Piece: Weakspot DMG +10% | 3-Piece: Get Bullet Saver effect with every precise kill, Weakspot DMG +15% for 8s. Effect can stack up to 3 times. | 4-Piece: After killing an enemy, gain Reload Efficiency +20%. If it is a Weakspot kill, also gain Fire Rate +10%. Lasts until you reload.

sets.name: Bastille Set

bonuses.description: When HP is above 70%, Weapon DMG +10%

Stay crouched and immobile for 0.5s to enter the Bastille state. While in the Bastille state, gain Weapon DMG +40%. After exiting the Bastille state, you cannot sprint and your Stamina consumption is increased by 100% for 3s.
3s after exiting Bastille state, gain 1 stack of Armor per second, up to 60 stacks. While in Bastille state, each stack of Armor provides a Shield equal to 1% of max HP.

sets.description: 1-Piece: When HP is above 70%, Weapon DMG +10% | 2-Piece: Reload Efficiency +15% | 3-Piece: Stay crouched and immobile for 0.5s to enter the Bastille state. While in the Bastille state, gain Weapon DMG +40%. After exiting the Bastille state, you cannot sprint and your Stamina consumption is increased by 100% for 3s. | 4-Piece: 3s after exiting Bastille state, gain 1 stack of Armor per second, up to 60 stacks. While in Bastille state, each stack of Armor provides a Shield equal to 1% of max HP.

sets.name: Blackstone Set

bonuses.description: Upon dealing Elemental DMG, gain 1 stack(s) of Warm Sensation (Elemental DMG +2%) for 2s. Triggers 1 time every 0.5s, up to a maximum of 5 stacks.
When the temperature is between 10°C and 30°C, you gain the Warm status (Elemental DMG +18%).
At 5 stacks of Warm Sensation, you are considered to be in the Warm status. When the environmental temperature is between 10°C and 30°C, gain Elemental DMG +7%.

sets.description: 1-Piece: Cold Resist and Heat Resist +2.5 | 2-Piece: Upon dealing Elemental DMG, gain 1 stack(s) of Warm Sensation (Elemental DMG +2%) for 2s. Triggers 1 time every 0.5s, up to a maximum of 5 stacks. | 3-Piece: When the temperature is between 10°C and 30°C, you gain the Warm status (Elemental DMG +18%). | 4-Piece: At 5 stacks of Warm Sensation, you are considered to be in the Warm status. When the environmental temperature is between 10°C and 30°C, gain Elemental DMG +7%.

sets.name: Blackstone Set (Cold)

bonuses.description: Upon dealing Elemental DMG, gain 1 stack(s) of Warm Sensation (Elemental DMG +2%) for 2s. Triggers 1 time every 0.5s, up to a maximum of 5 stacks.
When the temperature is below 10°C, you gain Cold status (Elemental DMG +10%). For every additional degree below that, gain Elemental DMG +0.5%, up to 20%.
At 5 stacks of Warm Sensation, the environmental temperature drops by 5°C, the DMG bonus provided by the Cold status is doubled, and its cap is increased to 40%.

sets.description: 1-Piece: Cold Resist +5 | 2-Piece: Upon dealing Elemental DMG, gain 1 stack(s) of Warm Sensation (Elemental DMG +2%) for 2s. Triggers 1 time every 0.5s, up to a maximum of 5 stacks. | 3-Piece: When the temperature is below 10°C, you gain Cold status (Elemental DMG +10%). For every additional degree below that, gain Elemental DMG +0.5%, up to 20%. | 4-Piece: At 5 stacks of Warm Sensation, the environmental temperature drops by 5°C, the DMG bonus provided by the Cold status is doubled, and its cap is increased to 40%.

sets.name: Blackstone Set (Heat)

bonuses.description: Upon dealing Elemental DMG, gain 1 stack(s) of Warm Sensation (Elemental DMG +2%) for 2s. Triggers 1 time every 0.5s, up to a maximum of 5 stacks.
When the temperature is above 30°C, you gain Passion status (Elemental DMG +10%). For every additional degree above that, gain Elemental DMG +0.5%, up to 20%.
At 5 stacks of Warm Sensation, the environmental temperature rises by 5°C, the DMG bonus provided by the Passion status is doubled, and its cap is increased to 40%.

sets.description: 1-Piece: Heat Resist +5 | 2-Piece: Upon dealing Elemental DMG, gain 1 stack(s) of Warm Sensation (Elemental DMG +2%) for 2s. Triggers 1 time every 0.5s, up to a maximum of 5 stacks. | 3-Piece: When the temperature is above 30°C, you gain Passion status (Elemental DMG +10%). For every additional degree above that, gain Elemental DMG +0.5%, up to 20%. | 4-Piece: At 5 stacks of Warm Sensation, the environmental temperature rises by 5°C, the DMG bonus provided by the Passion status is doubled, and its cap is increased to 40%.

sets.name: Blast Set

bonuses.description: After using Melee attack to Kill an enemy, instantly gain 5 Prime Energy, and increase DMG of your next Melee attack by 20% within 5 seconds.
Melee kill an enemy to instantly recover 30 Stamina and increase Movement Speed by 20% for 2s (cooldown: 3s).

sets.description: 1-Piece: Heavy Melee DMG +20% | 2-Piece: Torso DMG Reduction +12% | 3-Piece: After using Melee attack to Kill an enemy, instantly gain 5 Prime Energy, and increase DMG of your next Melee attack by 20% within 5 seconds. | 4-Piece: Melee kill an enemy to instantly recover 30 Stamina and increase Movement Speed by 20% for 2s (cooldown: 3s).

sets.name: Falcon Set

bonuses.description: When Stamina is over 90%, increase Crit Rate by 5% and Crit DMG by 20%.
After killing an enemy, immediately recover 30 Stamina and gain 20% increased Movement Speed for 2s. Cooldown: 3s.

sets.description: 1-Piece: Rolling Stamina cost -20%. | 2-Piece: Crit DMG +12% | 3-Piece: When Stamina is over 90%, increase Crit Rate by 5% and Crit DMG by 20%. | 4-Piece: After killing an enemy, immediately recover 30 Stamina and gain 20% increased Movement Speed for 2s. Cooldown: 3s.

sets.description: 1-Piece: Jump Height +10%. | 2-Piece: Magazine Capacity +15%

sets.name: Heavy Duty Set

bonuses.description: After killing an enemy, increase Movement Speed by 20% for 2s and Elemental DMG (Blaze, Frost, Shock, Blast) by 40%, decay over 8s.
Within 5m, each enemy grants you DMG Reduction +4%. Effect can stack up to 4 times.

sets.description: 1-Piece: Max HP +10% | 2-Piece: Element DMG (Blaze, Frost, Shock, Blast) +8% | 3-Piece: After killing an enemy, increase Movement Speed by 20% for 2s and Elemental DMG (Blaze, Frost, Shock, Blast) by 40%, decay over 8s. | 4-Piece: Within 5m, each enemy grants you DMG Reduction +4%. Effect can stack up to 4 times.

sets.name: Lonewolf Set

bonuses.description: Gain 1 stack of Lone Shadow for every 4 Crit shots landed with a weapon. Lone Shadow: Crit DMG +6% for 20s, stacking up to 8 times.
Increases maximum Lonewolf stacks to 10. After reloading, gain Crit Rate +10% for 2s.

Lone Shadow: Crit DMG +6% for 20s, stacking up to 8 times. | 4-Piece: Increases maximum Lonewolf stacks to 10. After reloading, gain Crit Rate +10% for 2s.

bonuses.description: When the load is over 80, DMG taken -10%, Weapon and Tactical Item DMG +15%
Stamina cost -30% when gliding and rolling

sets.name: Renegade Set

bonuses.description: Gain 1 stack of Archer's Focus upon hitting the same enemy consecutively. Archer's Focus: Weakspot DMG +4%, stacking up to 10 times. Archer's Focus stacks are halved upon changing targets.
When reloading, for every 1% of shots from the previous magazine that were Weakspot hits, load an extra 0.6% ammunition, capped at an extra 30%.

sets.description: 1-Piece: Movement Speed +8% | 2-Piece: Melee DMG +15% | 3-Piece: HP +600 | 4-Piece: Gathering Speed +20%

sets.name: Savior Set

bonuses.description: While shielded, Weapon DMG and Status DMG dealt increases by +10%.
Consumes 6% of current HP on hit to generate a temporary shield equal to 6% of Max HP, lasting 30s (Cooldown: 0.5s; does not trigger if Shield exceeds 60%)
Automatically uses the lowest-grade Treatment in the backpack when HP is below 30% (Cooldown: 40s).

sets.description: 1-Piece: Medicine CD Reduction +20% | 2-Piece: While shielded, Weapon DMG and Status DMG dealt increases by +10%. | 3-Piece: Consumes 6% of current HP on hit to generate a temporary shield equal to 6% of Max HP, lasting 30s (Cooldown: 0.5s; does not trigger if Shield exceeds 60%) | 4-Piece: Automatically uses the lowest-grade Treatment in the backpack when HP is below 30% (Cooldown: 40s).

Sprint Speed +12% and Stamina Recovery Speed +20% when HP is below 50%

bonuses.description: Each weapon hit grants 1 stack of Deviant Energy. Every stack of Deviant Energy grants 1% Elemental DMG (Blaze, Frost, Shock, Blast). Effect can stack up to 20 times. Reloading removes half of the total stacks.
Increase max Deviant Energy stack by 10. Grant 2 additional stacks when hitting a weakspot.

Rolling consumes 3 stacks of Powered Armor and triggers an explosion that knocks back surrounding enemies. For each enemy hit, HP +5%, up to 20% (cooldown: 10s).
